channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog poo everywhere, 23rd May
item.description:
Endemic problem. We need daily cleaning and signs until the culprit stops doing this. Thank you for your help.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Kelmore Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass, 23rd May
item.description:
Broken glass on pavement by bus stop on coop side of Belmont lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rotting boards on overbridge, 23rd May
item.description:
I was crossing the pedestrian bridge at what I believe is the South Dock Marina just off South Sea Street, I noticed that several of the wooden planks felt unstable and really flimsy, as though they may be weakened or rotting. I wanted to bring this to your attention promptly, as I’m concerned the bridge may be unsafe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rope Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 23rd May
item.description:
Large graffiti tag on this green cabinet at this location.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westgate Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafitti on electricity cabinet outside cossall park, 23rd May
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Usual fly tipping outside cossall park, 23rd May
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On cycle path on tavistock lane, in the direction towards Byng place, 23rd May
item.description:
I noticed a manhole in a cycle lane raised on one side, such that anyone who hit it would trip over and crash. It is currently dark and the side elevated is opposite to the street light in its shadow making it very difficult to see when going straight on. Its on Tavistock place, and I’m worried it makes a dangerous, hard to see, and hard to avoid hazard for cyclists who might otherwise be going at considerably fast speeds.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Tavistock Place, St Pancras, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytips on Edgehill, 23rd May
item.description:
There is regularly piles of flytipped furniture dumped at this spot on Edgehill Road. Please can the flytips be cleared and this area be monitored. It looks like the patch has become a dumping ground for the local flats to get rid of any rubbish - and I am unclear why the council don’t seem to be taking any action. Please can this area, and the grass area of Edgehill be cleared of rubbish and then monitored to prevent more build up I previously submitted this report but the council did nothing and marked it as fixed despite the next day despite the rubbish and flytips still remaining!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edge Hill, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: People are using this street to get under the influence on drugs at night, 23rd May
item.description:
Could Greenwich council get some night policing. Since this street is a dead end there are random people coming at night using it as a place to get under the influence of drugs whilst in their cars. Not really safe at all now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goldfinch Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footway obstruction outside old Argos site, 23rd May
item.description:
Contrary to Section 137 of the Highways Act 1980, this large rubbish receptacle is repeatedly being stored on the footway, close to the old Argos site in Sandringham Road. It is a hazard for pedestrians particularly those who are Blind/visually impaired.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandringham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox on footpath, looks like it’s been hit by a car, 23rd May
item.description:
Dead fox on the footpath of Main Road, Sidcup next to junction with Alder Road, looks like it’s been hit by a car poor thing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pile of clothes and a few bin bags left outside of my windows, 23rd May
item.description:
This is a recurring issue. Extra large amount of trash is being left under our windows causing bad smell, pest risk and distress. This week it’s a pile of clothes and bin bags. Our outside black general trash bin is constantly being filled in as well.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilberforce Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gardening waste littering street, 22nd May
item.description:
Gardening waste littering street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, it's been 3 days!, 22nd May
item.description:
Street still not working, has been that way since Wednesday. I see that it has been reported but clearly not fixed. I did not report the original problem but now........3 days! and a Bank Holiday weekend. Come on Greenwich, pull your finger out.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 22nd May
item.description:
Previously repaired pothole failing. High risk of danger to motorcyclists. Included Google and Apple maps images for reference. The hole is worse than it was 2 months ago when it was last captured by Google. Hope this helps.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M25, Waltham Abbey, Epping Forest
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on private property, 22nd May
item.description:
Graffiti sprayed on private property, we are the freeholders of the building and would like the tag to be removed please. It probably was done either today or within the last couple of days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe New Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass all over the pavement, 22nd May
item.description:
There’s broken glass all over the pavement it could be dangerous to people or animals walking over it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Tulse Hill, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown foliage, 22nd May
item.description:
This is a consistent problem that has been going on for months. The property next to the bins has foliage which is always extremely overgrown. It interfers with front access to the enclosed bins. It is the same at the rear. A few of the ground floor properties that face Cooks Road, when you walk through to the rear of the block, foliage is vastly overgrown which affects access to the path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cook's Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Just next to the pond, 22nd May
item.description:
The light has gone out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80-90, South Hill Park, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rat sightings, 22nd May
item.description:
I am concerned that we have spotted rats numerous times in the last few weeks in Bexley Woods which we walk through on the school run. One was also spotted in a friend's garden who lives on Penhill Rd. We have lived here for 4 years & never seen rats in the woods. It's a very popular spot for children & animals so this is alarming.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Bridgen Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
